title: Implement tooltip state bar integration (priority sorting, hide_default filtering, per-player mix)

reference_files.reason: Tooltip integration - state bar display rules, priority sorting, hide_default filtering, per-player state mixed display, format example
Default tooltip layout - state bar position and display rules (hide_default false or non-default values)
Shift tooltip layout - state bar same as default

acceptance_criteria: Tooltip state bar appears between traits bar and plugins bar (matching design doc layout)
State bar only appears when at least one state is displayable (no empty state bar header)
States sorted by display.priority descending, ties broken by state ID lexicographic ascending
hide_default=true states hidden when value equals default value
State name displayed with display.color, value displayed in gray using display.format template ({value} placeholder replaced)
Per-gun states read from GunState of the tooltip item
Per-player states read from PlayerState of the player viewing the tooltip (mixed with per-gun, unified priority sort)
Per-player states only shown when player is holding a gun (not for non-gun items)
State bar display is same across all modifier key levels (default/Shift/Ctrl/Alt - no separate expansion)
Unregistered states (no StateDefinition in registry) are skipped silently (no display, no error)
deliverables: src/main/java/org/yanbwe/modularshoot/client/tooltip/TooltipBuilder.java (updated: integrate state bar into existing tooltip assembly)
